## Summary
- What does this PR change?

## Screenshots / Video (required for UI changes)
- If this PR changes UI/UX, include at least one screenshot or short recording.
- If not applicable, write: **N/A (no UI changes)**

## Test Plan
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual testing steps (list)

## Checklist
- [ ] Lint / typecheck / tests pass
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
